channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tiangco expresses confidence in VP Sara Duterte’s commitment to address flood control issues if elected president
item.description: Navotas Representative Tobias Tiangco expressed full confidence that Vice President Sara Duterte will hold accountable those responsible for the ongoing flood control problems if she wins the 2028 pre...

item.title: PIA Flight Diverts to Karachi After Cabin Pressure Issue
item.description: A Lahore-bound Pakistan International Airlines (PIA) flight PK178 coming from Fujerah, UAE, was forced to land in Karachi on Tuesday night due to a technical problem involving cabin pressure. Accordin...

item.title: Sundowns reclaim top spot after 3-1 victory over Marumo Gallants
item.description: Mamelodi Sundowns have regained the top position in the Betway Premiership after a 3-1 home victory against Marumo Gallants at Loftus on Tuesday night. The Brazilians extended their winning streak to ...

item.title: Zelenskyy outlines Ukraine's drone capabilities and their potential role in Middle East defence
item.description: In his third address to the UK Parliament since the Russian invasion, President Volodymyr Zelenskyy presented a more optimistic tone, emphasising Ukraine's advancements in drone technology. Dressed fo...

item.title: Trump criticises Sir Keir Starmer over Middle East support, energy, and immigration policies
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump expressed disappointment in UK Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer for not providing immediate support during the recent conflict with Iran. Speaking in the Oval Office al...

item.title: PM Modi discusses Gulf security with UAE President amid Iran drone attacks
item.description: Prime Minister Narendra Modi held a phone conversation with UAE President Sheikh Mohamed bin Zayed Al Nahyan for the second time since the outbreak of war in West Asia on 28th February. During the dis...

item.title: PTI leaders warn of worsening economic situation due to Gulf conflict and lack of reforms
item.description: Five senior leaders of Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI), currently jailed in Kot Lakhpat Jail, have expressed serious concerns over the fragile state of Pakistan's economy. In a letter shared by their l...

item.title: International Society Urges Rivers State Commissioners to Improve Ministry Performance
item.description: The International Society for Social Justice and Human Rights don call on the newly sworn-in commissioners for Rivers State make dem start with proper institutional audit for their ministries. Dem tal...

item.title: Parliamentary committee urges Tanzanians to heed weather forecasts during wet season
item.description: Wanachama wa Kamati ya Kudumu ya Bunge ya Mazingira ya Msingi wamwomba Wanatanzania wakidhi kwa makini taarifa za mafuta ya hewa zinazotolewa na watu wa kifaa, ili kuboresha kazi zao za ufundishaji na...

item.title: Protest Group Plans to Field Multiple Candidates in Terrebonne Byelection
item.description: The Longest Ballot Committee, known for its previous efforts to challenge Pierre Poilievre in last year’s federal election and subsequent byelection, is now setting its sights on the upcoming April 13...

item.title: PIA Flight Diverts to Karachi After Cabin Pressure Issue, Will Continue to Lahore
item.description: On March 17, 2026, Pakistan International Airlines (PIA) confirmed that flight PK178 from Fujerah, UAE to Lahore had to make an emergency landing in Karachi due to a cabin pressure-related technical i...

item.title: Overview of Australia's Weather for Tuesday 17 March 2026
item.description: The national weather forecast for Tuesday, 17 March 2026, provides an overview of expected conditions across Australia. The forecast highlights variations in weather patterns, with some regions experi...

item.title: One bettor wins over P100 million in Ultra Lotto 6/58 jackpot
item.description: On Tuesday, March 17, 2026, a lone bettor successfully won the Ultra Lotto 6/58 jackpot with a prize exceeding P100 million, according to the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO). The winning ...

item.title: Court Upholds Zamfara Lawmaker’s Seat After Party Defection
item.description: Di Court of Appeal wey dey sit for Abuja don reverse di earlier Federal High Court judgment wey remove Hon. Abubakar Gummi from him seat for House of Representatives representing Gummi/Bukkuyum Federa...

item.title: Ontario Premier criticizes Parole Board decision to grant temporary absences to convicted child murderer
item.description: A 65-year-old man serving a life sentence for the 1986 first-degree murder and sexual assault of a 14-year-old boy has been granted two additional unescorted temporary absences (UTAs) into the communi...

item.title: Senate Adopts Resolution Allowing Filipinos to Exhaust Local Court Remedies Before ICC Surrender
item.description: On March 17, 2026, the Philippine Senate formally approved Senate Resolution No. 307, which expresses the sense of the chamber to allow Filipinos accused of crimes abroad to first seek remedies in loc...

item.title: Parliament urges funding to complete ISW construction projects
item.description: The Parliamentary Standing Committee on Social Welfare and Development has visited the Institute of Social Welfare (ISW) in Dar es Salaam and stressed the need for the Ministry of Community Developmen...

item.title: Muslim organisations in Mumbai support Supreme Court comments on gender equality in inheritance
item.description: Several Muslim organisations in Mumbai have expressed support for the Supreme Court's recent remarks concerning the inheritance rights of Muslim women, calling it a significant step towards gender equ...

item.title: Davao City Water District maintains water rates despite rising fuel costs
item.description: DAVAO CITY, Philippines — The Davao City Water District (DCWD) has assured its customers that there will be no increase in water rates despite the ongoing rise in fuel prices. Jovana Cresta Duhaylungs...

item.title: An Overview of Mexico’s Drug Cartels and Their Impact on Violence
item.description: The recent death of Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes, known as 'El Mencho' and leader of the Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación (CJNG), has intensified attention on drug-related violence in Mexico. His kill...
